data_sources.name: 2023 Lyme Disease Cases by County
data_sources.description: County-level reported Lyme disease case counts for 2023 (exact numbers, not just dots)
data_sources.notes: Perfect drop-in for county heatmap. Direct from CDC page.

data_sources.name: Lyme Disease Cases by State or Locality 2008-2023
data_sources.description: State-level Lyme case counts and incidence over time
data_sources.notes: Good for trends and fallback when county data is missing

data_sources.name: Reported Tickborne Disease Cases by County 2019-2022
data_sources.description: County-level cases for Lyme + Babesiosis + Anaplasmosis + Ehrlichiosis + Spotted Fever Rickettsiosis + more

data_sources.name: Geographic Distribution of Suspected Alpha-gal Syndrome Cases
data_sources.description: MMWR study with county-level suspected AGS cases from lab data (highest per capita counties listed)
data_sources.notes: No raw CSV, but detailed county tables and maps. Cross-reference with census for rates.

data_sources.name: Tick Surveillance Data Sets - Ixodes (Blacklegged) Ticks
data_sources.description: County-level established/reported status for blacklegged ticks and associated pathogens (2023–2026 update)
data_sources.notes: Best for actual tick presence/density layers

data_sources.name: Lone Star Tick Surveillance (Alpha-gal vector)
data_sources.description: County-level distribution of Lone Star ticks
data_sources.notes: Part of the main tick surveillance hub

data_sources.name: CDC Tick Data Research Hub
data_sources.description: Main landing page for all tick species surveillance maps and downloads
data_sources.notes: Links to every species-specific Excel file

data_sources.name: CDC WONDER NNDSS Annual Summary
data_sources.description: Interactive query tool for national notifiable disease data (Lyme + others)

integration_status: Metadata added to lyme_ags_sources.json and additional_sources.json. Full data download + processing planned for county-level heatmap work.
